title: Raw Milk
description: This mod makes raw milk dangerous to drink. Cook the milk to make it safe.
body:
# Raw Milk Mod
Tired of milk being _too easy_ in Minecraft? Spice things up with **Raw Milk**!

Now, when you milk a cow, you’ll get _raw milk_—unprocessed and a bit risky. Raw milk still clears status effects but comes with a drawback: drinking it will give you the Hunger status effect. To avoid this, cook your raw milk to transform it into _pasteurized milk_. Pasteurized milk is safe to drink and free of the Hunger debuff!

But that’s not all—this mod also introduces _chocolate milk_! Combine milk with cocoa beans to create a sweet treat that gives you the Speed effect, perfect for when you need a quick boost!
## Customization Options
This mod includes a customizable config file, giving you control over milk stack sizes and status effect durations. The fabric config file is located at:


```
C:\Users\username\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\config\rawmilkconfig.properties
```


You can open this file with a text editor to adjust the following settings:


```
rawmilk.stack.size=1          # int | default: 1
pasteurizedmilk.stack.size=1  # int | default: 1
chocolatemilk.stack.size=1    # int | default: 1
rawmilk.status.duration=600   # int | default: 600
chocolatemilk.status.duration=600 # int | default: 600
```

**Stack Size**: Change the number of milk buckets you can stack (e.g., set to 8 for half the amount of empty buckets).

**Status Duration**: Adjust the duration of status effects. For instance:

- Set _rawmilk.status.duration_ to 900 for a longer Hunger effect (45 seconds).

- Set _chocolatemilk.status.duration_ to 300 for a shorter positive effect (15 seconds).

For Forge, the config file is located at:
```
C:\Users\username\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\config\rawmilk-common.toml
```

## New in v1.0.1
- Raw milk can now be used to feed baby cows or goats, helping them grow faster—just like wheat!
- Goats now provide raw milk, giving you another source of dairy in Minecraft!


## Why Choose Raw Milk?
This mod brings more realism to your farming experience, turning milk into a complex and strategic resource. Whether you’re a survival expert or looking for a fresh challenge, Raw Milk adds depth to your Minecraft world!

Download Raw Milk today and transform the way you milk your cows!
